name: Online Learning Shadow
scope_implemented: src/adaptation/ module layout per AGENTS.md Section 21.5 (10 submodules)
GaussianTSBandit: Gaussian Thompson Sampling with conjugate updates (policies/bandit.py)
RLPolicyStub: Phase 12 placeholder returning neutral SHADOW action (policies/rl_policy.py)
Walk-forward scorer with locked hold-out + Brier calibration + drift monitoring (scorer.py)
LearnerController state machine (SHADOW/RECOMMEND/LIVE_BOUNDED/FROZEN); applied=False in shadow (controller.py)
RollbackGuard with 5 triggers: envelope_breaker, regime_unsafe, divergence, underperformance, manual_kill (rollback.py)
Snapshot versioning with SHA-256 checksum + frozen-fallback persistence (versioning.py)
AdaptationConfig loading from configs/adaptation.yaml with lru_cache (config.py)
configs/adaptation.yaml with mode=SHADOW, bounds, rollback, scoring params
LearnerLog SQLAlchemy model added to src/db/models.py
online_learner_version field added to Settings + versions() output
LEARN-PROMO-S gate implemented (src/gates/phase11.py, 15 criteria) and registered in checks.py

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Bounded learner in SHADOW mode (applied=False always); learner_log table populated
Calibration monitoring (Brier score) implemented and exercised
Section 21.x eligibility met (BoundedAction schema, ActionBounds, SHADOW mode only)
acceptance_criteria.evidence: adaptation_imports PASS; config_mode_shadow PASS; validate_clamps_bucket PASS

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Frozen fallback exists and tested (snapshot save/load + frozen-fallback round-trip)

acceptance_criteria.evidence: gate criterion envelope_guard_rejects_bad: forbidden param rejected; unknown strategy rejected; oversized bucket clamped

tests.quality_gate_note: make test lint typecheck passed — 397 passed, 164 files formatted, mypy clean (2026-06-17T21:35Z)

known_gaps_risks: RLPolicyStub is a Phase 12 placeholder; real RL policy delivered in Phase 12
SHADOW mode only — no live influence; applied=False is enforced by controller not policy
Scorer uses synthetic decisions in gate; real shadow log accumulation begins post-deploy
LEARN-PROMO-S promotion to RECOMMEND requires manual operator step (no automatic promotion)
next_step: Reviewer Agent independently re-runs LEARN-PROMO-S gate and verifies criteria; human approves advancing to Phase 12 (RL Policy)
